name: bluebubbles-cli
description: Curated BlueBubbles CLI organized around terminal-friendly resources

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.build.json --resolve-full-paths && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:sync-openapi && cd docs && mint dev --no-open
scripts.docs:validate: bun run docs:sync-openapi && cd docs && mint validate
scripts.release: bun run check && bun run build && npm publish --cache /tmp/npm-cache
